mnemonics: FLOW Like Water: Data Flows through sensors, Logic decides its Path, Outputs make Waves in the physical world.
keyPoints: Control flow dictates the order of execution for device operations.
It handles decision-making (if/else) and repetition (loops) based on sensor input.
Efficient control flow is critical for low-power IoT devices to conserve battery life.
commonMistakes: Creating infinite loops that drain the device battery or make it unresponsive.
Not implementing error handling for sensor data (e.g., checking for NULL or out-of-range values).
Using blocking code (e.g., long 'delay()' calls) that prevents the device from responding to new inputs.
